characters.name: 江岚
characters.description: 2D国漫少女角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，年轻女性，黑色中长发带整齐刘海，圆润清秀但不幼态的脸，浅灰蓝长袖连衣裙，深色腰带，清楚可见的领口、袖口和裙摆层次，平底深色鞋，身形纤细，气质安静克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景，完整穿衣，不能像灰模或人体模板。

characters.name: 沈砚
characters.description: 2D国漫青年男性角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，黑色短发，清秀偏瘦的脸，深色长外套或长袍内搭浅色上衣，长裤和深色鞋靴，身形修长，气质沉稳克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景。

shots.title: 河边远景建立
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, 江岚 is a young woman with black medium-long hair, neat straight bangs, a round delicate non-childish face, a light gray-blue long-sleeve dress, a dark waist belt, flat dark shoes, slim body, full body, clearly visible, in the scene, 沈砚 is a young man with black short hair, a slim refined face, a dark long coat over a light inner shirt, dark trousers, dark boots, tall slender body, full body, clearly visible, in the scene, keep both characters exactly the same appearance in every shot, medium wide eye-level shot from the left-front side, dusk riverside stone path near the old stone bridge, 江岚 standing on the left side of the stone path slightly ahead, finishing a small step and turning her head toward the river, right hand lifting slightly to signal 沈砚, calm alert expression, 沈砚 walking on the right side of the same stone path half a step behind, slowing down and turning his head toward 江岚, attentive expression, both characters fully visible from head to toe, both characters grounded with clear foot contact on the stone path, both characters naturally integrated into the riverbank environment, shadow matching environment, contact shadows under both feet, correct perspective, bridge in the mid background, willow trees on the left, open river on the right, no pure scenery frame, no pasted cutout
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, scenery only, no character, one character only, missing character, different hairstyle, changed dress, changed coat, changed shoes, inconsistent face, inconsistent outfit, pasted character, sticker-like character, collage, character sheet, mannequin pose, blank expression, no expression, static standing, cropped body, cut off feet, floating character, detached shadow, wrong perspective, indoor scene, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: slow push in, 江岚 finishes a small step and slightly raises her right hand, 沈砚 slows and turns his head toward her, river ripples and willow leaves move lightly
shots.notes: 建立镜头必须锁定两人的固定外观，并让动作已经开始发生。两人都要踩在沿河石路上，阴影方向和傍晚环境一致，不能像背景上贴了两张立绘。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 双人中景起话

shots.title: 江岚近景说话
